# Project Overview

This is a sample project for testing the rawq chunker.
It contains code in multiple languages.

## Features

- Fast file walking with .gitignore support
- Language detection by file extension
- Tree-sitter based code chunking

## Getting Started

Install the project using cargo:

```
cargo install rawq
```

Then run it on your codebase.
